args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
avg_ratings = pd.DataFrame(var_call_p8RUvKo2LVrkO5dZH3cKe2hr)
la_businesses = pd.DataFrame(var_call_DvtQF3OJxy9qFCeObV73oTth)
merged = la_businesses.merge(avg_ratings, on='gmap_id', how='left')
merged['avg_rating'] = merged['avg_rating'].astype(float)
result_df = merged.sort_values('avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)
result = result_df[['name', 'avg_rating']].to_dict(orient='records')
result_json = json.dumps(result)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result_json)
